llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: GDE/FF - SAP Consultant (M/F/D)
job.department: GDE/FF Business Partner & Finance Master Data
job.description: SAP Consultant OrgCode: tbc Product Team: Business Partner Finance Master Data Responsibilities: "You will be responsible for ensuring the operation and project delivery across all phases you will execute business requirements engineering and ensure provisioning of standard IT features - You will do error analysis and corrections of Incident and Problems (Provide 2nd and/or 3rd level support). - As part of our agile development team you will work on user stories, do the development and testing of new features. - With your extensive experience on the subject matter, you will guide, coach and train other team members build competencies for the respective modules. - You will be assigned projects where you will have end to end responsibility for all deliverables" Qualifications: "- Deep process and functional expertise in SAP MDG Business Partner, including configuration of the BP data model, business partner roles, relationships, and MDG UI (FPM/Fiori) to design fit‑for‑purpose business partner master data solutions.- Proven experience implementing BP creation and change processes in SAP MDG, including change request handling, duplicate detection, validations, as well as incident analysis and remediation.- Ability to translate business requirements for Business Partner data into executable validation and enrichment rules using BRFplus and standard MDG BP solutions.- Knowledge of integration technologies for SAP MDG, including web services, event/data streaming, and interfaces to internal and external systems.- Proven experience in Business Partner harmonization, cleansing, and migration activities, including source profiling, mapping and transformation of BP roles, addresses, and accounts, as well as reconciliation and post‑migration validation."
